title: Metamorphosis (Kafka)
full_description: A stage adaptation of Franz Kafka's The Metamorphosis (Die Verwandlung, 1915) — the story of Gregor Samsa, a travelling salesman who wakes one morning to find himself transformed into a monstrous insect, and the slow disintegration of his family as they struggle to cope with what he has become. One of the most performed adaptations of one of the foundational texts of 20th-century literature.
ai_summary: A theatrical staging of Kafka's novella — Gregor Samsa wakes as a monstrous insect, and the world that surrounded him begins its slow, inexorable collapse. One of the most adapted texts in modern theatre.
